title: update gvproxy version to 0.8.5
body:
Align gvproxy version to gvforwarder which has already been bumped in #25615 fa0e5af54282.
These versions should really be bumped together as they were previously in #25501 48662fa32b49.

<!--

-->

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/release-notes.md

```release-note
Update the bundled gvproxy version to 0.8.5
```
